canonical_definition: Test set consisting of 45 C implementations of Project Euler mathematical challenge problems, used to evaluate transpilation accuracy on algorithmic code.
papers: Guess & Sketch: Language Model Guided Transpilation
To the Cutoff... and Beyond? A Longitudinal Perspective on LLM Data Contamination

definitions.text: Test set consisting of 45 C implementations of Project Euler mathematical challenge problems, used to evaluate transpilation accuracy on algorithmic code.
definitions.paper: Guess & Sketch: Language Model Guided Transpilation

relationships.paper: To the Cutoff... and Beyond? A Longitudinal Perspective on LLM Data Contamination
relationships.evidence: we conduct the first thorough longitudinal analysis of data contamination in LLMs by using the natural experiment of training cutoffs in GPT models to look at benchmarks released over time. Specifically, we consider two code/mathematical problem-solving datasets, Codeforces and Project Euler
